MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mohammed Sadiq is present.
William Eugene Gilg appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Clorys Rauda is present.
Ted Janowsky representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of April 1, 2008 remains set.
